context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 37.1-37.3 fully tested. Key features: (1) Confirmation dialogs when moving from Reality to Dreaming/Hunt - 'Releasing to the clouds?' for Dreaming, 'Back on the hunt?' for Hunt; (2) 'Seeking Upgrade' tag added to ISO items when moving to Hunt; (3) Multi-select mode with select-mode-btn toggle, bulk-action-bar shows selected count, Select All/Dreamify/Huntify buttons work correctly. Backend bulk endpoints: POST /api/records/bulk-move-to-wishlist and POST /api/records/bulk-move-to-iso accept {record_ids: string[]} and return {moved: number, message: string}.
